Package com.dtwthalion.ttio

Class FeatureFlags

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.FeatureFlags
public final class FeatureFlags extends Object
Reader/writer for TTI-O feature flags stored as root group attributes. @ttio_format_version = "1.1" @ttio_features = JSON array of feature strings
Since:
0.5

    • OPT_PQC_PREVIEW

      public static final String OPT_PQC_PREVIEW
      v0.8 M49: file uses post-quantum crypto (ML-KEM-1024 and/or ML-DSA-87). Opt-flag — a reader without PQC can still open the file and read unencrypted datasets. @since 0.8
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OPT_PER_AU_ENCRYPTION

      public static final String OPT_PER_AU_ENCRYPTION
      v1.0: channels encrypted per Access Unit. @since 1.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OPT_ENCRYPTED_AU_HEADERS

      public static final String OPT_ENCRYPTED_AU_HEADERS
      v1.0: AU semantic header encrypted. @since 1.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OPT_MS2_ACTIVATION_DETAIL

      public static final String OPT_MS2_ACTIVATION_DETAIL
      v0.12.0 M74: spectrum_index carries four optional parallel columns recording MS/MS activation method and precursor isolation window. Files that set this flag are written with format version "1.3"; pre-M74 readers that ignore the flag still parse the base columns. @since 0.12
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
